description:
Advances: mutagen.cli

Deliverable:
- Full content in `README.md`: quick-start example, JSON schema link
  (pointing at the golden fixtures as the schema-by-example),
  Known Caveats list (state drift on `use SomeModule`, macro mutation
  slowdown, equivalent mutants, `mix format` ID stability via
  content-addressed IDs, no `--no-json` in v1, `--seed` controls ExUnit
  ordering, scope colon syntax dropped, self-mutation refused).
- `@moduledoc` content on `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen` with sections: Synopsis,
  Flags, Examples, Constraints, Exit Codes, JSON Schema Pointer, Known
  Caveats (per M-T4).
- `CHANGELOG.md` initial v1 entry.

Verification:
- `mix help mutagen` displays the @moduledoc cleanly with all named sections.
- `mix compile --warnings-as-errors --force` clean.
- Covers spec-verification stub `mutagen.cli.v4`.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenario `mutagen.cli.r9` — every Caveats item
  appears in the `mix help mutagen` output.

Out of Scope (files):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/**` (apart from doc-only edits to existing modules if
  they're missing module docs that this stage adds)
- Any test file

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- `README.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` (`@moduledoc` only)
- `@moduledoc` / `@doc` strings on existing modules in `lib/mutagen_ex/`
  (additive only — do not change behavior)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not change behavior. Every doc change must be additive; if a docstring
  describes behavior that doesn't match the code, fix the docstring (or
  file a bug ticket against the offending stage).
- Do not document anything as supported that isn't actually supported in
  v1 — e.g., don't mention `--no-json` or the colon scope syntax as
  "coming soon" without a v1.1 plan.

Merge gate:
- [ ] `mix help mutagen` output contains all Caveats items
- [ ] `mix compile --warnings-as-errors --force` clean
- [ ] Spec verification passes (`mutagen.cli.v4`)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S8: Docs + README + CHANGELOG
